introSection: Storm is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Dubai Hills Mall in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The ride's structure is integrated directly into the building's structure.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Storm opened on February 17, 2022 inside the Dubai Hills Mall.

In 2022 American firm US Thrill Rides sued Storm's manufacturer, Intamin, over the project, claiming that the coaster was the Polercoaster design by US Thrill Rides.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The structure which contains the ride is tall.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Storm is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Dubai Hills Mall in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The ride's structure is integrated directly into the building's structure.

Storm opened on February 17, 2022 inside the Dubai Hills Mall.

In 2022 American firm US Thrill Rides sued Storm's manufacturer, Intamin, over the project, claiming that the coaster was the Polercoaster design by US Thrill Rides.

The structure which contains the ride is tall.

3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.
